body_plan.core_shape: large rounded head fused directly into a tapering conical body, no visible neck

parts.shape: large rounded dome narrowing into a long flat scoop-like beak/jaw
long flat elongated open beak with a small pointed chin flap underneath
wide conical trunk, tapering from shoulders to a jagged zigzag hem at bottom
single angular jagged-edged wing-like limb with zigzag feather-like notches
parts.placement: right side of body, extended outward like an arm

parts.shape: thin straight line with a small perpendicular cross-tick near the end
parts.placement: left side, extending horizontally from body like a held stick or second thin arm

parts.shape: thin straight lines of uneven length

distinctive_features: long flat open beak with a small pointed chin flap, no visible neck joining head to body
single jagged zigzag-edged wing on only one side, functioning like an arm
thin stick-like second arm with a small cross-tick mark near its end
jagged zigzag hem at the bottom of the body
locomotion: waddles on two thin uneven legs, using the single jagged wing-arm for awkward flapping or balance
vibe: a lopsided, one-winged bird-creature that looks like it's mid-shrug, part gull, part stick figure
